text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Heeey, Trainer! Get a load of that fresh morning
air!
choice_data_list: You're even more energetic than usual.
You're even more energetic than usual.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, I guess so! I ran into Prez yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She told me I seem like I'm working extra hard
recently. Can you believe it? ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I slept so well cause of that!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep at it so she'll praise me even
more! Aw yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio runs off in better spirits than usual.
